brand.name: bomann
brand.tagline: Custom-made storage from a Norwegian manufacturer

hero.headline: Find Your Perfect Wardrobe
hero.subtext: Answer four quick questions and we'll recommend the right solution for your space — based on thousands of completed Bomann projects.

questions.question: What door style do you prefer?
What interior fittings do you need?
What size are you working with?

results.headline: Your Recommendations
results.subtext: Based on your answers, here are the Bomann solutions that best match your needs.

packages.name: Essentials
packages.description: A straightforward wardrobe with quality Norwegian craftsmanship. Ideal for smaller spaces where function comes first.

packages.name: Classic
packages.tagline: The Bomann standard. Timeless and precise.
packages.description: Our most popular solution. Combines a refined exterior with a well-organised interior that works for everyday life.

packages.name: Signature
packages.tagline: A statement piece. Built for the detail-oriented.
packages.description: For larger spaces and those who want the full Bomann experience — complete interior organisation with a premium exterior finish.

packages.name: Glass Studio
packages.description: Our glass-door collection transforms any room. Frameless precision, full interior customisation, and unmistakable presence.

hero.headline: Lock In Your Price Today
hero.subtext: Secure your Bomann wardrobe with a 20% deposit. No surprises — your quoted price is held while we prepare your personalised offer.

payment_modal.headline: Confirm Your Deposit
payment_modal.subtext: This is a 20% deposit to secure your quoted price range. A Bomann advisor will contact you to confirm measurements and finalise your order.
payment_modal.disclaimer: Simulated payment — no real charge will be made.

confirmation.headline: You're Confirmed
confirmation.subtext: Your deposit has been received and your price is locked.
confirmation.contract_note: A contract and price confirmation will be sent to your email address.
confirmation.advisor_note: A Bomann advisor will be in touch within 1 business day to discuss measurements and next steps.
confirmation.hubspot_banner: Your enquiry has been logged. Reference: {ref_id}
